comments.overrides: Monorepo dependency coherence. react-native is forced to a single 0.76.9 so it hoists to the root next to expo (avoids the CocoaPods 'ReactAppDependencyProvider depended upon by ExpoModulesCore' failure caused by expo-hoisted-but-RN-nested split; loose 'react-native:*' peers from @react-native-firebase/expo otherwise pull RN latest). The other three pin apps/web's React-19/Next-16/firebase toolchain to the versions it builds cleanly on, so the clean install required for the RN override doesn't drift web.
